ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alliances" (
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alliance */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the alliance */,
  "alliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the alliance */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the alliance was formed */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the alliance */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors supporting the alliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alliances_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the captain */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the captain has been involved in robotics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round number of the match (e.g., QuarterFinal, SemiFinal) */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alliance participating in the match */,
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backup alliance (if applicable) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the alliance */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the match is played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_backup_id FOREIGN KEY ("backup_id") REFERENCES backups ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_alliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("alliance_id") REFERENCES alliances ("alliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alliance related to the result */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the tournament */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win or loss result (e.g., '2 - 1', '0 - 0') */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_alliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("alliance_id") REFERENCES alliances ("alliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup alliance */,
  "backup_name" TEXT /* Name of the backup alliance */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alliance the backup is associated with */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the backup alliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backups_alliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("alliance_id") REFERENCES alliances ("alliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* City or venue where the tournament is held */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alliance to which the team belongs */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain of the team */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was formed */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_alliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("alliance_id") REFERENCES alliances ("alliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alliance for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost */,
  "total_points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the alliance in all matches */,
  "average_points_per_match" REAL /* Average points scored per match */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the alliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_alliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("alliance_id") REFERENCES alliances ("alliance_id")
)
